18.reason: This uses %s to read tokens separated by whitespace, but words are sequences of letters only. Punctuation attached to words (e.g., "hello,") is not removed, causing the entire token to be treated as one word instead of separate words.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: Reads tokens separated only by whitespace; punctuation without spaces merges words (e.g., "hello,world" becomes "helloworld").
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  This uses %s to read tokens separated by whitespace, but words are sequences of letters only. Punctuation attached to words (e.g., "hello,") is not removed, causing the entire token to be treated as one word instead of separate words.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Using %s splits only on whitespace, but punctuation should also act as word separators per problem definition.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Using %s reads until whitespace, failing to treat punctuation as word separators as required by the problem definition.

22.reason: Error: Non-letter characters within a token are skipped but do not terminate the current word; the traversal continues, causing adjacent words to be merged.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: Non-letter characters within a token are skipped but do not terminate the current word; the traversal continues, causing adjacent words to be merged.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Fails to reset trie pointer u when non-letter characters are encountered, causing separate words to be incorrectly merged.

26.reason: This unconditionally increments the count for the node u after processing the entire token. However, when non‑letter characters appear within the token (e.g., punctuation), they are ignored but the path is not reset, so letters after a non‑letter are added as children of the previous letter, incorrectly concatenating words. Also, if the token consists entirely of non‑letters, u remains 0 and this line increments t[0].res, corrupting the root node.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: Increments count unconditionally; if token contains no letters, root count is incremented. Also fails to handle word delimiters within the token (e.g., punctuation) – only the final node is counted.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  This unconditionally increments the count for the node u after processing the entire token. However, when non‑letter characters appear within the token (e.g., punctuation), they are ignored but the path is not reset, so letters after a non‑letter are added as children of the previous letter, incorrectly concatenating words. Also, if the token consists entirely of non‑letters, u remains 0 and this line increments t[0].res, corrupting the root node.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Unconditionally increments frequency count even if the string contained no letters, and fails to reset u to the root for the next word.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  The trie pointer u is not reset when non-letter characters are skipped, causing words separated by punctuation to be incorrectly merged.

24.reason: Missing braces cause the comma-separated assignments to execute unconditionally, corrupting the trie structure.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Missing braces cause the comma-separated assignments to execute unconditionally, corrupting the trie structure.
